title: coaching — helper functions
description: Ergonomic helpers for resolving a Staff's coaching profile, listing active assignments, computing availability, and gating on tier entitlements.

helpers.purpose: Returns the active CoachingProfile for a Staff (or null when the Staff isn't a Coach). Cache-hot via `cop:by_staff:{staff_id}`.
True when the Staff has an active + verified CoachingProfile. Used by session-assignment eligibility checks.
Returns active + verified coaches whose primary sport matches the key. accepting_only=true narrows to is_accepting_new_athletes.
All open assignments for a coach (end_date IS NULL OR > NOW()). Feeds /me/assignments.
Returns the current head_coach for a Session / Team / Event (or null). Cache-hot via `cas:head_coach:{type}:{id}`.
Every active assistant_coach on an assignable. Order stable by CoachAssignment.created_at.
Resolves the coach's weekly availability minus their active assignments in that week. Powers the scheduling UI + customer booking picker.
All held certifications for a coach. verified_only=true filters to verified_at != null.
Every cert whose expires_at is within N days from now. Delegates to `ccf:expiring:{tenant_id}:{cadence_days}` cache when the cadence matches 90/30/7.
All current ratings for a coach. ratableType='Sport' narrows to sport-level ratings only.
The single highest-value active rating a coach holds on a specific Sport / Discipline / Position. Used in match-making.
True when tenant holds the `coaching_multi_branch` entitlement. Read on assignment-form rendering.
